reviews.comment:
Estacion reantigua, no esta a la altura de otras modernas full. Además quedó en el medio de la ciudad que dificulta el tráfico. Hoy Neuquen ha crecido explosivamente además del cambio de la traza de la ruta nacional 22 que modificó el tráfico. Hoy caben nuevas estaciones sobre nueva ruta.

(Translated by Google)
The station is quite old and doesn't measure up to other modern, fully equipped stations. Furthermore, it's located in the middle of the city, which hinders traffic. Neuquén has grown explosively, and the rerouting of National Route 22 has also altered traffic patterns. Now, there's room for new stations along the new route.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtazhHNGl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente calidad de combustible..., no solo por la marca YPF en sí, sino porque siempre los tanques de almacenamiento están limpios y en muchos años nunca! tuve un problema de encendido en los vehículos ... no puedo decir lo mismo de otras estaciones de servicio, inclusive de la marca.
Recomiendo en este sentido a todas las estaciones del ACA .
Muy cómodo el salón de cafetería.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent fuel quality... not only because of the YPF brand itself, but because the storage tanks are always clean, and I've never had a problem starting a vehicle in many years! I can't say the same about other service stations, including this brand.
I recommend all ACA stations in this regard.
The cafeteria area is very comfortable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtb3RuMmRREAE

reviews.comment:
Es el ACA de mi ciudad.
Pros:
buena atención de los playeros
Contras:
para el viajero, queda algo retirado de la ruta.
No tiene baño en la playa, y para usar el del full, le tenés que pedir a la empleada (que generalmente está atendiendo) que te abra la puerta del baño

(Translated by Google)
It's the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) in my city.

Pros:
Good service from the attendants.
Cons:
For travelers, it's a bit far from the main road. There's no restroom on the beach, and to use the restroom at the full-service station, you have to ask the employee (who's usually busy helping customers) to open the restroom door for you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRLWJDUGl3RRAB
